name: Subagents Dashboard
description: Control UI tab showing all spawned sub-agents with prompts, status, and token usage.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often the dashboard refreshes. Default: 5000ms.

soulzApiUrl.label: Soulz API URL
soulzApiUrl.help: URL of the Soulz platform API for agent generation.

soulzApiKey.label: Soulz API Key
soulzApiKey.help: API key for authenticating with the Soulz platform.
